11403.title: The Situation Room with Wolf Blitzer
11403.description: Wolf Blitzer is in the command center for breaking news, politics and extraordinary reports from around the world.

11404.title: Erin Burnett OutFront
11404.description: Erin Burnett stays ahead of the headlines, delivering a show that's in-depth and informative.

11405.title: Anderson Cooper 360
11405.description: Anderson Cooper goes beyond the headlines to tell stories from many points of view, so you can make up your own mind about the news.

11406.title: Cuomo Prime Time
11406.description: Chris Cuomo gets after it with newsmakers in Washington and around the world.

11407.title: Don Lemon Tonight

11410.title: Marketplace Africa
11410.description: A look at the contemporary African art market; given the wide range of applications, satellites are part of the solution when it comes to solving the connectivity gap in Africa.

11411.title: Inside Africa
11411.description: From superbikes to racecars, some of South Africa's fastest men and women on wheels provide an inside look at what life is like on, and off, the track.

11412.title: Africa Avant Garde
11412.description: We hear from some of the continent's most experimental contemporary artists, including acclaimed Nigerian visual artist Victor Ehikhamenor.

11413.title: Connecting Africa
11413.description: From the CEO of a massive energy company in South Africa and fruit exporters in Egypt to the man who bought a bank in Nigeria, we look at all aspects of doing business in Africa.

11415.title: Marketplace Africa
11415.description: Kenya's apparel sector localizes its supply chain and the role of Kenya-based textile manufacturers; African designers looking for success internationally face unique hurdles.

11417.title: African Voices Changemakers
